concept: Refugee Scholar Creating Desert Blood Magic
biography: Romanian refugee family fled to US late 1970s (fleeing communism and possibly supernatural threats). Grew up in Kenosha, Wisconsin immigrant community. Books were his childhood protection and escape, leading to love of learning. Embraced early 1980s. Working on experimental Dehydrate Thaumaturgy path perfect for Arizona desert conditions. This research is his chance to prove he deserved the Embrace despite lower generation. Nervous, survival-focused, perpetually on guard - people often think 'rat' when they see him. Good #2 to James Whitmore. Resents Dr. Ashford but acknowledges her superiority.
equipment: Research notes on Dehydrate path, occult texts, cheap but functional ritual components

disciplines.name: Thaumaturgy
disciplines.notes: Still developing this path - working toward Level 3

backgroundDetails.Mentor: James Whitmore provides guidance and support

merits_flaws.name: Eat Food
merits_flaws.description: Can consume mortal food without difficulty

merits_flaws.name: Prey Exclusion (Upper Class)
merits_flaws.description: Cannot feed from wealthy/upper class victims comfortably

merits_flaws.name: Inferiority Complex
merits_flaws.description: Feels need to constantly prove worth, especially regarding his Embrace

merits_flaws.name: Eerie Presence
merits_flaws.description: People instinctively think 'rat' - nervous energy, hunched posture, darting eyes

status.notes: Passionate about Dehydrate path research - this is his validation. Scrappy survivor mentality. Resents Dr. Ashford but knows she's better. Loyal #2 to Whitmore. Limited by 12th generation (max 2 dots in Thaumaturgy paths). Behavioral 'rat' quality from posture and nervous survival instincts, not malicious.

research_notes.dehydrate_path_progress: Working on Level 3: 'Desert Wind' - area effect dehydration. Theory complete, testing needed. Arizona environment perfect for this research. Path could be genuinely useful to Tremere in desert regions. Success would prove I deserved the Embrace despite generation limitations.
